title: DragonLoot
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/)
![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/M5WWYwJ.png) [](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/DragonLoot/) [](https://github.com/GitPois1x/DragonLoot/issues)


DragonLoot is a simple mod that adds a new crafting material for the Ender Dragon. Once you kill the Ender Dragon you'll get some dragon scales that can be used to craft a new set of armor and an unbreakable anvil. Dragon armor crafting: ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/Urzqpe0.png) Dragon armor durability/defense (top down) 962/7 1295/10 1184/9 1036/7 The Dragon anvil works exactly like a normal anvil, but it never breaks, has no level cap, and won't ask you for more than 30 levels of experience. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/h5x0UoC.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) Videos showcasing this mod: [https://youtu.be/96uHWSpxEg8](https://youtu.be/96uHWSpxEg8) [https://youtu.be/NxogJuhUAZ8](https://youtu.be/NxogJuhUAZ8) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
